name: palantir-ontology
description: Successor Ontology-First runtime for the ~/projects fleet — the governed semantic + kinetic digital twin (Data+Logic+Action+Security decisions) that every consumer project binds to instead of re-deriving; replaces palantir-mini.

interface.shortDescription: Successor Ontology-First runtime: governed semantic + kinetic digital twin for the ~/projects fleet.
interface.longDescription: Successor Ontology-First runtime for the ~/projects fleet — the governed semantic + kinetic digital twin (Data+Logic+Action+Security decisions) that every consumer project binds to instead of re-deriving; replaces palantir-mini. The currently exposed MCP surface is read-only capability introspection.
defaultPrompt: Query palantir-ontology for per-runtime capability facts sourced from the neutral capability registry.
